name: Glassmorphism
description: Frosted glass effect with blur and transparency
column10: SaaS dashboards dark mode crypto fintech hero sections
column11: Use on dark or gradient backgrounds for maximum effect
column12: Never on white background — effect disappears completely

name: Bento Grid
description: Asymmetric modular card grid inspired by Apple
use_cases: 1fr); varied grid-column/row spans; rounded-xl; subtle shadows
do_examples: Dashboards feature showcases product pages Apple-style marketing
dont_examples: Vary card sizes (2x2 4x2 3x1) for visual rhythm
column7: Never equal-size boring grid of identical cards

name: Neumorphism
description: Soft embossed raised/pressed effect from background
use_cases: Settings panels toggles subtle form controls
dont_examples: Never on dark backgrounds — looks broken and muddy

name: Dark Mode Enterprise
description: High-contrast dark UI for data-heavy applications
use_cases: Trading dashboards analytics developer tools cybersecurity
do_examples: Use green/red only for data meaning not decoration
dont_examples: Never use pure #000000 — causes OLED smearing artifacts

name: Minimal Corporate
implementation: White bg; max-w-6xl mx-auto; generous padding; subtle borders; no decorative elements
do_examples: Let content breathe with 48px+ section spacing
dont_examples: Never fill every pixel — whitespace IS the design

name: Brutalism
implementation: Bold fonts black borders no border-radius flat color blocks high contrast
use_cases: Creative agencies portfolios fashion editorial disruptors
do_examples: Black 2-4px borders; flat solid colors; bold statement type
dont_examples: Never in fintech healthcare government — kills trust

name: Gradient Hero
description: Vibrant gradient backgrounds for marketing impact
use_cases: SaaS landing pages app launches startup marketing
do_examples: Test gradient direction — diagonal often most dynamic
dont_examples: Never use 5+ color gradients — looks dated and amateur

name: Scroll Storytelling
description: Content reveals as user scrolls creating narrative
implementation: Intersection Observer API; opacity 0→1 + translateY 20px→0 on scroll; staggered children
use_cases: Landing pages product marketing narrative campaigns
do_examples: Stagger child elements 100-150ms apart for natural flow
dont_examples: Never animate things that aren't visible at scroll entry

name: Card Hover System
description: Consistent card interaction across all surfaces
implementation: transition: all 200ms ease; hover: translateY(-4px) shadow-xl; cursor-pointer
use_cases: Any clickable card dashboard item product listing
do_examples: Keep lift to 2-4px max for subtlety
dont_examples: Never skip hover states on interactive cards — feels broken

name: Data Visualization Dark
description: Charts and data tables on dark backgrounds
implementation: bg-slate-900; axis color #475569; grid lines #1E293B; data series vivid contrast
do_examples: Use pure vivid colors for data lines on dark
dont_examples: Never use pastel colors for data — invisible on dark bg
